name: Modular Office Buildings
description:
Modular office buildings give a growing business a permanent, building-grade workspace without the months an RCC structure takes — and SAMAN's standard unit is a 20′ × 15′ × 11′ office building, 300 sq ft on the floor, with an 11-foot internal height that a regular site cabin cannot offer. It is built around a Steel & Wood structure at our Bangalore and Greater Noida plants, finished as a proper office, and delivered ready to commission. Priced at ₹13,85,000, it is the unit businesses choose when they want a building they can keep and even build upward on — not a temporary cabin.

What the 20′×15′×11′ modular office building includes

The structure is a mild-steel frame with insulated wall panels and an engineered wood floor system — the "Steel & Wood" build that keeps the shell rigid while giving the interior a warmer, finished feel than a bare metal cabin. The 11-foot height is the part most buyers underestimate: it leaves headroom for ducted air-conditioning, a storage loft or mezzanine over part of the floor, and a double-height feel at the entrance that reads as a real office, not a portable box.

Inside the 11-ft-high modular office building — room for a storage loft and ducted air-conditioning.

Inside the 300 sq ft you can lay out a reception with one or two cabins and a small work area, or an open floor for six to eight desks. Doors, windows, electricals to sub-board level, and the false ceiling are fitted at the factory; final commissioning happens after the unit is set on its base.

Building-grade modular construction — why it beats RCC and outlasts a cabin

Modular construction means the building is fabricated as a complete module under factory conditions and set on a prepared base on site, instead of being cast brick-by-brick in the open. For an office at this scale that matters in two ways.

Factory-built module set onto a prepared base — modular construction with no wet trades or curing delays.

Against RCC, you avoid the wet trades, the curing time, and the weather delays — the same logic behind SAMAN's wider prefab building range, which runs 40% faster than conventional construction. Against a lightweight site cabin, the building-grade frame, the floor system, and the 11-ft height give you a structure rated for permanent daily use, not a stop-gap. If your requirement spans offices plus a showroom or counter area, our commercial prefab structures cover that mixed-use case.

Going two-storey: stacking modular office buildings for a multi-floor workspace

Because each module is engineered as a self-supporting building, two modular office buildings can be stacked to give a two-storey, multi-floor office on the same plot footprint — the practical answer when land is tight but headcount is growing.

Two modular office buildings stacked into a two-storey workspace — more office on the same footprint.

The ground module carries the structural load path and the staircase tie-in; the upper module is craned and bolted at the floor-beam and roof-purlin lines. This is the route for businesses that need a permanent office that goes up. If instead you want a single-storey office built in one piece, the single-storey prefab office building is the simpler choice; multi-floor demand is what this page is built for.

How much does a modular office building cost in India?

A modular office building in India starts at ₹13,85,000 for SAMAN's 20′×15′×11′ unit (300 sq ft, Steel & Wood, factory-finished). Price moves with floor area, going two-storey, interior fit-out (AC, partitions, flooring grade), and site distance. A firm figure follows a quick site and layout review.

A delivered modular office building on an SME compound — the ₹13,85,000 unit in its working setting.

Beyond the base unit, the four levers that change the number are footprint (larger plate or extra modules), a second floor (added frame and staircase), interior specification (ducted AC, glass frontage, partition count, flooring grade), and delivery distance from Bangalore or Greater Noida. Building-grade modular units of this type are typically ready in 6 to 10 weeks depending on configuration.

Modular office building vs. office cabin vs. portable office: which fits

These three SAMAN products get confused because all are "modular," but they solve different problems:

Product Footprint / scale Starting price Best for
Modular office building (this page) 20×15×11 ft, two-storey ready ₹13,85,000 A permanent office building you may extend upward
Modular office cabin 50×40 ft, ~2,000 sq ft single floor ₹43,55,000 A whole large office floor in one go
Modular portable office Single units added side-by-side Lower entry Starting small and adding portable units as you grow

A modular office building in a commercial campus — the permanent, building-grade choice among the three options.

In short: choose the modular office building when you want a permanent structure that can go two-storey, the modular office cabin when you need one large floor immediately, and a portable office when you want to start with one unit and add more later.

Frequently asked questions

Can a modular office building be relocated, and how often?

Yes. Because it is bolted at defined structural lines rather than cast in place, the building can be lifted and moved to a new site. Single-storey units relocate more readily; a stacked two-storey set is dismantled floor-by-floor first. Most owners relocate two to three times over the structure's life without affecting integrity.

How is this different from a prefab office building?

A prefab office building is delivered as one fixed single-storey office. A modular office building is engineered so modules can be stacked into a two-storey, multi-floor workspace on the same footprint. If you will never go upward, the prefab office building is simpler; if you might, choose modular.

Is the 11-ft height enough for a mezzanine or loft?

Yes — 11 feet allows a partial storage loft or a small mezzanine over part of the 300 sq ft, plus clearance for ducted AC below it. A full second working floor is better handled by stacking a second module rather than a mezzanine.

Get a project quote

Tell us your headcount, whether you need one or two floors, and your site location for a firm price and timeline.

Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
short_description:
20×15×11 ft modular office building — permanent, building-grade, two-storey ready.
Factory-finished Steel & Wood office with 11-ft height for ducted AC and a storage loft.
Size / Capacity
20×15×11 ft · 6–8 desks
Frame / Panel
Steel & Wood · insulated
Price / Delivery
₹13,85,000 · 6–10 weeks
Build / Relocations
Two-storey ready · 2–3
SKU SP-CC-40-2024
Bangalore · Delhi NCR
